xray-skills.description: 13 developer tools: code review, security audit, API design, database design, project analysis, testing strategy, performance optimization, UI/UX design, DevOps deployment, documentation generation, storyteller, and more. Works standalone — no configuration needed.

xray-governance.description: [Advanced] Multi-skill governance orchestrator — runs proposals through code-review, security-audit, researcher + external Dynamo Solar SSOT. Requires additional setup (see docs).

xray-enforcer.description: Codex compliance enforcement — validates proposals against Codex policy rules (tests-required, type-safety, security, etc.)

xray-orchestrator.description: Multi-agent orchestration via thinDispatch 7-flow routing (simple/moderate/complex/enterprise delegation)
